info.title: TaskNebula API
info.description: OpenAPI documentation for the TaskNebula HTTP API. Only the public, stable surface is documented; internal/admin routes are intentionally omitted.

cookieAuth.name: __Secure-authjs.session-token
cookieAuth.description: NextAuth session cookie. In dev the cookie is named `authjs.session-token`.

allOf.description: Jira-style resolution. Setting a value stamps `resolvedAt`; an explicit `null` clears both fields.

usageCount.description: Number of issues currently tagged with this label.

name.description: Renaming also rewrites the legacy `issues.labels` JSONB arrays org-wide in the same transaction.

releasedAt.description: Stamped when the version is released.

allOf.description: Transitioning to `released` stamps `releasedAt` (if unset); back to `unreleased` clears it.

moveOpenIssuesToVersionId.description: Optional: re-point unresolved issues' fix-version to another version of the same project.

SetIssueVersionsBody.description: Replaces the respective association set(s). At least one of `fixVersionIds` or `affectsVersionIds` must be provided. Every referenced version must belong to the issue's project.

leadId.description: Must be an active member of the organization.
Must be an active member of the organization.

componentIds.description: Replaces the issue's component set. Every component must belong to the issue's project.

get.description: Returns issues visible to the authenticated user. Optionally filter by project, assignee, status category, sprint, parent, or type.

403.description: Forbidden — caller has no access to the requested project.

post.description: Creates a new issue in the given project. The caller must have `create` permission for the project.

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient permissions to create issues.

get.description: Fetch a single issue by id.

403.description: Forbidden — caller has no view access.

patch.description: Partial update. The required permission depends on which fields are changed (edit, assign, transition, schedule).

403.description: Forbidden — missing permission for one of the requested changes.

404.description: Issue or referenced status not found.

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient permissions.

get.summary: List projects accessible to the current user
get.description: Returns projects from organizations the caller is a member of, optionally narrowed by `organizationId` and/or `teamId`. Super admins see all projects in the scope.

403.description: Forbidden — caller is not in the requested organization.

get.description: Returns the organization's labels with per-label usage counts, ordered by name. When `projectId` is given, returns that project's labels plus org-wide labels. `q` filters by case-insensitive name prefix.

schema.description: When given, returns that project's labels plus org-wide labels (`projectId = null`).

200.description: A list of labels with usage counts.

403.description: Forbidden — caller is not an active member of the organization.

404.description: Project not found in the organization.

post.description: Creates an org-wide label, or a project-scoped one when `projectId` is provided. Label names are unique per (organization, project) scope.

403.description: Forbidden — caller is not an active member of the organization.

404.description: Project not found in the organization.

409.description: A label with this name already exists in this scope.

patch.description: Rename / recolor / re-describe a label. On rename, the legacy `issues.labels` JSONB arrays in the organization are rewritten in the same transaction.

403.description: Forbidden — caller is not a member of the label's organization.

409.description: A label with this name already exists in this scope.

delete.description: Deletes the label. Issue associations cascade, and the name is removed from the legacy `issues.labels` JSONB arrays org-wide in the same transaction.

403.description: Forbidden — caller is not a member of the label's organization.

get.description: Returns the project's versions ordered by sort order then name, with per-version issue counts (`doneIssueCount` = issues with a non-null resolution).

200.description: A list of versions with issue counts.

404.description: Project not found (or not visible to the caller).

post.description: Creates a version in the project. Requires project-manage permission. Version names are unique per project; the new version is appended to the sort order.

403.description: Forbidden — caller cannot manage the project.

404.description: Project not found (or not visible to the caller).

409.description: A version with this name already exists in this project.

patch.description: Partial update. Transitioning `status` to `released` stamps `releasedAt` (if unset); back to `unreleased` clears it. Requires project-manage permission.

403.description: Forbidden — caller cannot manage the project.

409.description: A version with this name already exists in this project.

delete.description: Deletes the version. Issue fix/affects associations cascade. Requires project-manage permission.

403.description: Forbidden — caller cannot manage the project.

post.description: Marks the version as released (stamps `releasedAt`). Optionally re-points unresolved issues' fix-version to another version of the same project via `moveOpenIssuesToVersionId`. The body may be omitted entirely. Requires project-manage permission.

200.description: The released version and the number of issues moved.

400.description: Invalid JSON body, validation failed, or the move target is invalid (same version or not in this project).

403.description: Forbidden — caller cannot manage the project.

get.summary: List fix and affects versions for an issue

200.description: The issue's fix and affects versions.

403.description: Forbidden — caller has no view access.

put.summary: Replace an issue's fix and/or affects versions
put.description: Replaces the provided association set(s). At least one of `fixVersionIds` or `affectsVersionIds` must be provided; every version must belong to the issue's project.

200.description: The issue's updated fix and affects versions.

400.description: Validation failed, or some versions do not belong to the issue's project (response includes `invalidIds`).

403.description: Forbidden — caller cannot edit the issue.

get.description: Returns the project's components ordered by name, with per-component issue counts.

200.description: A list of components with issue counts.

404.description: Project not found (or not visible to the caller).

post.description: Creates a component in the project. Requires project-manage permission. Component names are unique per project; `leadId` must be an active member of the organization.

400.description: Validation failed, or the lead is not an active organization member.

403.description: Forbidden — caller cannot manage the project.

404.description: Project not found (or not visible to the caller).

409.description: A component with this name already exists in this project.

patch.description: Partial update, including archiving via `archived`. Requires project-manage permission.

400.description: Validation failed, or the lead is not an active organization member.

403.description: Forbidden — caller cannot manage the project.

409.description: A component with this name already exists in this project.

delete.description: Deletes the component. Issue associations cascade. Requires project-manage permission.

403.description: Forbidden — caller cannot manage the project.

get.summary: List components linked to an issue

403.description: Forbidden — caller has no view access.

put.description: Replaces the issue's component set. Every component must belong to the issue's project.

400.description: Validation failed, or some components do not belong to the issue's project (response includes `invalidIds`).

403.description: Forbidden — caller cannot edit the issue.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user with their super-admin and account status. Equivalent to the legacy `/api/user/me` endpoint.

post.description: Run a structured search query against issues. Accepts JQL-style expressions like `assignee = me AND status = "In Progress"`.

400.description: Invalid query syntax or missing required fields.

get.description: Returns the health status of the application — database, memory, redis, livekit and smtp checks. Used by container orchestrators and monitoring.

503.description: Service is unhealthy (database or memory failure).
